name_en: Premium Factory Leather M15117 Purple with Cream White Small This Capucines small bag draws inspiration from Baroque jewelry, incorporating shell Monogram floral decorations on the chain to reflect the dynamic style of the new Daydream series. Taurillon calfskin creates an exquisite structure, with the flap either open or closed. Removable shoulder strap for flexible carrying. Dimensions: 27 × 17.3 × 9 cm
